fix_diff:
diff --git a/cr_narrow_ci.py b/cr_narrow_ci.py
+def _prepare_overlay_root(root, rel_path, content):
+    copy MODstore_deploy-shaped source tree into a temp overlay
+    write proposed CR content into overlay_rel before ruff/pytest
+
+def _resolve_test_file_for_root(test_file, root):
+    check root/test, root/MODstore_deploy/test, root/成都修茈科技有限公司/MODstore_deploy/test
+
-args = ["python3", "-m", "pytest", ...]
+args = [sys.executable, "-m", "pytest", ...]
root_cause: infer_related_test_files 返回相对于 MODstore_deploy 的路径，而 _run_pytest_subset 只解析 root/<test>；提议的 CR 内容也未在 ruff/pytest 前写入覆盖层。
symptom: cr_narrow_ci 对生产根目录形态跳过 pytest：测试位于 MODstore_deploy/tests 下，但子集运行器检查的是 root/tests
